en: -♪♪ Hello.
Mom. Hi. Why do you guys look so down? You said the season's over, and you only did, like, two videos.
Did, like, three, at least. Doesn't matter.
ko: 적어도 세 개는 했거든. 그건 중요한 게 아니야.

en: It's just, with everything going on in the news right now, it's just, things feel kind of bleak.
ko: 그냥 요즘 뉴스에서 벌어지는 일들 때문에, 좀 암울한 느낌이야.

en: Yeah, I just feel like the world is falling apart. Hey, you know what you guys need?
A vacation. Vacation? We have work. It'll be expensive.
ko: 휴가? 일이 있는데. 비쌀 텐데. 쉿.

en: Oh, shh. Tickets are on me.
You ever flown first class before?
What do you say, boys? A little vacay?
ko: 어때, 애들아? 짧은 휴가 한 번?

en: -♪♪♪ -♪ Mama, I've been wanting this my whole life ♪ First-class ticket-watching recline.
ko: -♪ 엄마, 평생 이걸 원했어 ♪ -♪ 퍼스트 클래스 좌석에 기대서 ♪

en: ScarJo got the effin' vibe right.
ko: -♪ ScarJo가 분위기를 제대로 잡았어 ♪ -♪ 전부 하이라이트 같은 기분 ♪

en: -♪ Whole life feeling like a highlight ♪ -♪ Hasta luego to all of my haters ♪
♪ Ballin' like Dwayne Wade, I'm one of the greatest ♪ -♪ Flight attendant with a thick old thang ♪
ko: -♪ 안티들한테 안녕 ♪ ♪ Dwayne Wade처럼 잘 나가, 난 최고 중 하나야 ♪

en: -♪ Handing me drinks like Goof King ♪ -♪ If you ain't up on sign ♪
-♪ ScarJ is the name when you're dealing with planes ♪ Whoo! -♪ Now listen up, I'm talking to you, jerk ♪
ko: -♪ 모르겠으면 알아둘 ♪ -♪ 비행기 타면 ScarJ가 이름이야 ♪

en: -♪ Ballin' in the sky all the way to Newark ♪ Shh. Did you say Newark?
Yeah, why? What's up? No, it's...
We're landing at Newark? Yeah, Newark. In New Jersey.
Damn, it's kind of windy out there, huh? Didn't we fly out of LaGuardia?
ko: 와, 밖에 바람 좀 부는데, 그치?

en: It's like a half-hour drive. No, but this is awesome.
Come on, I mean, we're in first class, right? Ha-ha!
-♪ Now I'm up in first class, hittin' on a spritz fast ♪ -♪ I don't got time, so I wear a wristwatch ♪
ko: 지금 퍼스트 클래스에서 칵테일 들이키는 중. 시간이 없어서 손목시계를 차

en: Is something going on at Newark? Like, are there planes crashing there or something?
No, I think they're just, like, losing them. Losing the planes?
ko: 아니, 그냥 비행기를 놓치는 거 같은데.

en: Yeah, like, losing track. Yeah, right, they're losing the planes in Newark, but the crashing is happening, like,
everywhere all the time now. Oh, yeah. Right.
ko: 요즘 어디서든 계속 나고 있잠아. 아, 맞다. 그래.

en: Yeah. Are you not nervous?
-♪ Bitch, I ain't scared of no plane ♪ -♪ I'm chillin' and I'm bringin' it on ♪ Aah!
ko: ♪ 난 비행기 따위 안 무서워 ♪ 여유롭게 즐기는 중이야. 아야!

en: Whoo! Whoo! Yeah, just gonna sit down and buckle up. Didn't like that at all.
ko: 그래, 앉아서 안전벨트 매야겠다, 저건 진짜 싫었어.

en: Apologies for the turbulence, folks, but good news, we've been cleared for landing at Newark.
ko: 난기류 죄송합니다, 승객 여러분. 좋은 소식은 Newark 착륙 허가를 받았습니다.

en: At least I think so. Haven't heard anything yet.
Oh, no. Hmm.
That's not good. Nah, that's scary.
Oh, the TV's just turned off. Once we land, I should be good.
Once we land, I'll be all right. I'm just gonna meditate, too. God's got me.
God's always got me. -♪ I can't be alone with the thoughts in my dome ♪ -♪ Mark, do you have any shows in your phone? ♪
ko: ♪ 머릿속 생각이랑 혼자 있을 수 없어 ♪ Mark, 폰에 볼 거 있어?

en: -♪ The only show I have is Lost ♪ -♪ I only have the pilot of Lost ♪ Why would you only have that one?
I didn't know I'd be here today!
Uh, bad news, folks. We are what we call in the biz, flying blind.
ko: 안 좋은 소식입니다, 승객 여러분. 업계 용어로 '맹목 비행' 중입니다.

en: Oh, God! Okay, be honest. Do you think we'll make the article, at least? What?
ko: 좋아, 솔직히, 우리 최소한 기사에는 나올까?

en: Do you think the article will be, like, Scarlett Johansson and Please Don't Destroy Diane Plaincrash, or just you?
ko: 그 기사에 Scarlett Johansson이랑 Please Don't Destroy Diane이 나올 거라고 생각해?

en: What's Please Don't Destroy? Who did you think we were?
Uh, pardon me while I give a quick call to our air traffic controller.
ko: 잠시 실례하고, 항공 관제사한테 전화 좀 할게요.

en: Come on. Pick up, pick up, pick up, pick up, pick up. Hello?
ko: 제발, 받아, 받아, 받아, 받아, 받아.

en: Hi. Are you having fun up there?
No, I'm not having fun. Sir, do you have our coordinates?
Uh... I don't know. It's my first day. What?!
It's your first day?! Yeah.
There's, like, no one here. Oh, fantastic.
Maybe you tell me, like, what color is your plane?
ko: 그러면 비행기 색깔이 뭘지 말해줄 수 있어요?

en: It's a freaking plane! I'm gonna find the emergency exit, and I'm gonna jump.
Do not open the emergency exit! I've got to. I want to!
Oh, God! That's a new one! Uh-oh! Looks like this is it, guys.
Anything to get off your chests? This might sound corny, but the only thing I regret is...
is that Avengers didn't make more money at the box office. What?!
ko: 어벤져스가 박스오피스에서 더 많이 벌지 못한 거야.

en: We are going down! If anybody can help us, please, please!
I can't give up on them. Yes. If I just...
forecade their coordinates... I'm starting to get my signal back.
...and calculate their wind resistance.
Hang on! I see the runway! I see the runway! I think I'm doing a good job.
I think I'm saving them. Oh, my God. It's working.
ko: 내가 그들을 구하고 있는 것 같아.

en: It's working!
♪ I can see you now you're on the mainframe ♪
♪ Now glide up, glide up and land this plane ♪
ko: 자, 기수를 올려, 올려, 그리고 착륙해요.

en: Oh! We did it! Yes!
I'm so happy. Yes! Yeah!
Now we can finally enjoy our vacation in Newark!
ko: 이제 드디어 Newark에서 휴가를 즐길 수 있어!

en: Oh. Oh. Oh. Yes. You can do anything you put your mind to.
